_notes.goal: $30 -> $100 in 7 days (+233%). Aggressive Kelly, tight stops, fast scanning.
_notes.balance: Starting bankroll in USD — used for Kelly sizing and session P&L tracking
_notes.max_bet: Hard cap per trade in USD (33% of bankroll). Kelly may suggest more, but this is the ceiling.
_notes.min_ev: Minimum expected value edge required to enter a trade. 0.06 catches more opportunities than default 0.10 without going too low.
_notes.max_price: Won't buy a YES share above this price (62¢). Avoids overpaying on near-certain markets with thin upside.
_notes.min_volume: Market must have at least this many shares traded. Filters illiquid markets with unreliable pricing.
_notes.min_hours: Skip markets resolving in less than 30 min — not enough time for the edge to play out.
_notes.max_hours: Skip markets resolving more than 72h out — near-term forecasts are more accurate and capital turns over faster.
_notes.kelly_fraction: Fractional Kelly multiplier (0.40 = 40% of full Kelly). Aggressive but bounded; tuner can adjust.
_notes.scan_interval: Seconds between full market scans (3600 = 1 hour). Balances API rate limits with opportunity capture.
_notes.max_slippage: Max allowed spread between best bid and ask (6%). Rejects markets where fill price would eat into edge.
_notes.prior_weight: Bayesian prior weight for sigma estimation — lower value (5) means observed MAE overrides the prior faster.
_notes.tune_lookback: Number of recent resolved trades the auto-tuner uses to adjust min_ev, max_price, kelly_fraction (15 = aggressive recency).
_notes.tune_enabled: Whether the auto-tuner is allowed to update strategy parameters after each resolved trade.
_notes.max_open_positions: Total concurrent open positions across all markets. Caps overall exposure.
_notes.max_positions_per_date: Max open positions sharing the same resolution date. Prevents overconcentration on a single day.
_notes.monitor_interval: Seconds between position monitor loops (300 = 5 min). Controls how quickly stop-loss and take-profit trigger.
_notes.stop_loss_pct: Exit if current price drops to 78% of entry. Cuts losses before they compound.
_notes.take_profit_short: Sell at 82¢ when 24–48h remain before resolution — tighter threshold as outcome becomes clearer.
_notes.take_profit_long: Sell at 70¢ when >48h remain — locks in profit early on high-confidence positions.
_notes.take_profit_final: Sell at 50¢ when <24h remain — catches near-certain winners in the final hours.
_notes.take_profit_roi: Sell whenever price is 50% above entry cost, regardless of time remaining. Always-on profit lock.
_notes.scan_regions: City regions to scan for weather markets. eu=Europe, us=US cities, asia=Asia, ca=Canada, sa=South America, oc=Oceania.
_notes.vc_key: Visual Crossing weather API key for forecast data.
_notes.polymarket_private_key: EOA private key used to sign Polymarket CLOB orders.
_notes.polymarket_funder: Wallet address that funds trades (may differ from signer on proxy wallets).
_notes.signature_type: Polymarket order signature type — 1 = EOA (direct wallet), 0 = contract wallet.
